    <style>
        .statistics {
            position: relative;
            padding: 64px 0 0;
            color: 000;
        }
        .statistics>div {
            position: relative;
        }
        .statistics-item:not(:last-of-type) {
            margin: 0 0 40px;
        }
        .statistics-title {
            font-size: 48px;
            font-weight: 900;
            line-height: 1.2;
            letter-spacing: -1px;
            text-align: center;
        }
        .statistics-text {
            font-size: 20px;
            font-weight: 700;
            line-height: 1.6;
            text-align: center;
            color: rgba(99, 99, 99, 1);
            opacity: .6;
        }
        .statistics-text>span {
            display: block;
            font-family: Axiforma;
            font-size: 20px;
            line-height: 1.6;
        }

        @media screen and (max-width: 991px) {
            .statistics-item {
                position: relative;
            }
            .statistics-item:not(:last-of-type) {
                margin: 0 0 80px;
            }
            .statistics-item:not(:last-of-type):after {
                content: '';
                width: 140px;
                height: 1px;
                background: rgba(223, 223, 223, 1);
                position: absolute;
                bottom: -40px;
                left: 50%;
                margin-left: -70px;
            }
        }
        @media screen and (min-width: 1200px) {
            .statistics {
                padding: 80px 0 0;
            }
            .statistics-wrapper {
                display: flex;
                flex-wrap: wrap;
                justify-content: center;
            }
            .statistics-item {
                padding: 20px 0;
                width: 30%;
            }
            .statistics-item:not(:last-of-type) {
                border-right: 1px solid rgba(223, 223, 223, 1);
                margin: 0;
            }
            .statistics-title {
                font-size: 60px;
            }
        }
    </style>

    
    <section class="experience">
        <div class="container">
            <div class="twin-cols" data-aos="fade-up" data-aos-delay="300">
                <div class="twin-cols__col">
                    <h2>
                        <span class="heading-accent">User</span>
                        Experience
                    </h2>
                    <p>The experience provided to users is what determines whether they’ll engage or ignore, subscribe or cancel, stick around or disappear, buy or brush-over, love or hate your site, your brand, your content.</p>
                </div>
                <div class="twin-cols__divider">
                    <img src="https://cool.co/publisher-experiences/wp-content/themes/coolmedia-insticator/assets/img/plus.png" alt="" width="141" height="187">
                </div>
                <div class="twin-cols__col">
                    <h2>
                        <span class="heading-accent">Partner</span>
                        Experience
                    </h2>
                    <p>The experience matters in the partners you choose as well, whether they have the experience to build a vibrant user community and take it to the next level, or whether they’ll squander the connections you’ve already made...</p>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="experience-banner">
            <div class="container experience-content">
                <p class="pre-header">We have the experience that matters to build you</p>
                <p class="h2-title">Experiences That&nbsp;Matter</p>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <section class="features">
        <div class="container">
            <div class="features-wrapper">
                                                        <div id="product-platform" class="features-item ">
                                                <div class="features-img__wrapper">
                            <img src="https://cool.co/publisher-experiences/wp-content/uploads/sites/6/2024/11/Graphic-2.webp"
                                 alt="">
                        </div>
                                                <div class="features-content__wrapper">
                            <h2>
                                <span class="color-dark">Supply-Side</span>                                <span class="color-green">Platform</span>                            </h2>
                                                            <p><span style="font-weight: 400">Our Supply Side Platform utilizes 1st party data collected from our engagement products, in combination with our unique direct demand from our owned media specialties; which allows us to drive higher bids from the DSPs and Advertisers we work with by supplying them a more targeted audience.</span></p>
<div></div>
<div id="professor_prebid-root"></div>
<div></div>
<div id="professor_prebid-root"></div>
<div></div>
<div id="professor_prebid-root"></div>
<div></div>
<div id="professor_prebid-root"></div>
                            
                            
                                                            <a href="/publisher-experiences/supply-side-platform/" class="btn-p"><span>Explore &gt;</span></a>
                            
                                                        <div class="faq-area">
                                                            <div class="faq-item open" data-image="">
                                    <div class="faq-question">Level up your targeting</div>
                                    <div class="faq-answer">We have collected over 100 million hashed email addresses that creates better targeting and higher CPMs for the publishers we partner with.</div>
                                </div>
                                                            <div class="faq-item " data-image="">
                                    <div class="faq-question">Made for a post-cookie world</div>
                                    <div class="faq-answer">Post-cookie proof monetization via our integrations with the top identity providers.</div>
                                </div>
                                                            <div class="faq-item " data-image="">
                                    <div class="faq-question">Built for scalability</div>
                                    <div class="faq-answer">The supply-side platform (SSP) allows publishers to offer ad space in an effective and scalable way.</div>
                                </div>
                                                            <div class="faq-item " data-image="">
                                    <div class="faq-question">Fully compliant</div>
                                    <div class="faq-answer">Fully GDPR &amp; CCPA Compliant.</div>
                                </div>
                                                        </div>
                            
                                                        
                        </div>
                    </div>
                                                        <div id="product-community" class="features-item __reverse ">
                                                <div class="features-img__wrapper">
                            <img src="https://cool.co/publisher-experiences/wp-content/uploads/sites/6/2024/11/Grpahic.webp"
                                 alt="">
                        </div>
                                                <div class="features-content__wrapper">
                            <h2>
                                <span class="color-dark">Commenting</span>                                <span class="color-green">Community</span>                            </h2>
                                                            <p>Get your visitors spending more time on your site while gathering trends of their interests with our Commenting, Article Sentiment, and Trending Now products.</p>
<div></div>
<div id="professor_prebid-root"></div>
<div></div>
<div id="professor_prebid-root"></div>
<div></div>
<div id="professor_prebid-root"></div>
<div></div>
<div id="professor_prebid-root"></div>
                            
                            
                                                            <a href="/publisher-experiences/commenting/" class="btn-p"><span>Explore &gt;</span></a>
                            
                                                        <div class="faq-area">
                                                            <div class="faq-item open" data-image="">
                                    <div class="faq-question">AI + human moderation</div>
                                    <div class="faq-answer">We believe humans are better than bots, and our team of human moderators are fully equipped to take on the task of keeping your comments brand safe.</div>
                                </div>
                                                            <div class="faq-item " data-image="">
                                    <div class="faq-question">Portability from other commenting tools</div>
                                    <div class="faq-answer">Our clean, user-friendly interface is designed to deliver a consistent, premium experience across screens of all shapes and sizes.</div>
                                </div>
                                                            <div class="faq-item " data-image="">
                                    <div class="faq-question">Seamless cross-screen experience</div>
                                    <div class="faq-answer">We’ll port what’s already on your site, including user names, comment history, and email addresses. Lose nothing!</div>
                                </div>
                                                            <div class="faq-item " data-image="">
                                    <div class="faq-question">Community gamification</div>
                                    <div class="faq-answer">Encourage positive user interaction and increased engagement with Reputation Points.</div>
                                </div>
                                                        </div>
                            
                                                        
                        </div>
                    </div>
                                                        <div id="product-engagement" class="features-item ">
                                                <div class="features-img__wrapper">
                            <img src="https://cool.co/publisher-experiences/wp-content/uploads/sites/6/2025/04/img-content-engagement.webp"
                                 alt="">
                        </div>
                                                <div class="features-content__wrapper">
                            <h2>
                                <span class="color-dark">Content</span>                                <span class="color-green">Engagement</span>                            </h2>
                                                            <p>Engage your audience with poll, trivia, and content discovery units.</p>
<div></div>
<div id="professor_prebid-root"></div>
<div></div>
<div id="professor_prebid-root"></div>
<div></div>
<div id="professor_prebid-root"></div>
<div></div>
<div id="professor_prebid-root"></div>
                            
                            
                                                            <a href="/publisher-experiences/content-engagement/" class="btn-p"><span>Explore &gt;</span></a>
                            
                                                        <div class="faq-area">
                                                            <div class="faq-item open" data-image="">
                                    <div class="faq-question">Capture the pulse of your audience</div>
                                    <div class="faq-answer">With our interactive content engagement units, publishers have the power to create custom trivia and poll questions, and track responses in our user-friendly publisher portal.</div>
                                </div>
                                                            <div class="faq-item " data-image="">
                                    <div class="faq-question">Managed services at no cost</div>
                                    <div class="faq-answer">Our talented in-house Content Team will create custom trivia and poll questions tailored to your audience(s) and brand goals.</div>
                                </div>
                                                            <div class="faq-item " data-image="">
                                    <div class="faq-question">Native content recirculation with spotlight</div>
                                    <div class="faq-answer">Boost the visibility of any article across your network, and keep readers on your site, by featuring it in a Spotlight card.</div>
                                </div>
                                                            <div class="faq-item " data-image="">
                                    <div class="faq-question">Email sign-ups made easy</div>
                                    <div class="faq-answer">Grow your subscriber list where readers are most engaged. Email Sign-Ups are 100% opt-in and privacy safe.</div>
                                </div>
                                                        </div>
                            
                                                        
                        </div>
                    </div>
                            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <style>
        .step-item {
            margin: 24px 0;
        }
        .step-counter-wrap {
            position: relative;
            display: flex;
            width: 50px;
            height: 42px;
        }
        .step-counter {
            position: relative;
            font-family: Axiforma;
            font-size: 12px;
            font-weight: 700;
            line-height: 1.5;
            letter-spacing: 0.47999998927116394px;
            color: #000;
            box-shadow: 0px 0px 32px 0px #0000001A;
            background: #fff;
            width: 50px;
            height: 42px;
            border-radius: 14px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            z-index: 2;
        }
        .step-counter-wrap .decorator {
            padding: 2px;
            width: 50px;
            height: 42px;
            border-radius: 14px;
            position: absolute;
            bottom: -4px;
            right: -4px;
            background: linear-gradient(97.91deg, #D39C10 7.66%, #F1CE0B 100%);
            z-index: 1;
        }
        .step-counter-wrap .decorator>div {
            background: #fff;
            border-radius: 14px;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
        }
        .step-title {
            font-family: Axiforma;
            font-size: 24px;
            font-weight: 700;
            line-height: 1.4;
            color: #000;
            margin: 20px 0 12px;
        }
        .step-text {
            font-family: Axiforma;
            font-size: 18px;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 1.4;
            color: #636363;

        }

        .btn-p {
            border: 2px solid #D39C10;
            padding: 12px 30px;
            border-radius: 12px;
            font-size: 16px;
            font-weight: 600;
            line-height: 24px;
            text-align: center;
            color: #D39C10;
            display: flex;
            width: fit-content;
        }

        .features-content__wrapper ul li {
            padding-left: 36px;
            position: relative;
            margin: 0 0 16px;
        }
        .features-content__wrapper ul li:before {
            content: '';
            width: 20px;
            height: 20px;
            position: absolute;
            left: 0;
            top: 50%;
            margin-top: -10px;
            background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg width='23' height='24' viewBox='0 0 23 24' fill='none' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cpath d='M11.375 0.625C9.1252 0.625 6.926 1.29213 5.05539 2.54203C3.18478 3.79193 1.72682 5.56847 0.865878 7.64698C0.00492835 9.7255 -0.220332 12.0126 0.218568 14.2192C0.657478 16.4257 1.74084 18.4525 3.33167 20.0433C4.92249 21.6342 6.94932 22.7175 9.1559 23.1564C11.3624 23.5953 13.6495 23.3701 15.728 22.5091C17.8065 21.6482 19.5831 20.1902 20.833 18.3196C22.0829 16.449 22.75 14.2498 22.75 12C22.7442 8.9849 21.5439 6.09502 19.412 3.96305C17.28 1.83107 14.3901 0.63078 11.375 0.625ZM16.7891 10.0094L10.3797 16.1344C10.214 16.2902 9.9947 16.3764 9.7672 16.375C9.656 16.3766 9.5456 16.3561 9.4423 16.3148C9.3391 16.2736 9.245 16.2122 9.1656 16.1344L5.96094 13.0719C5.87206 12.9943 5.79977 12.8996 5.74842 12.7934C5.69708 12.6872 5.66774 12.5717 5.66216 12.4539C5.65659 12.3361 5.67489 12.2183 5.71598 12.1077C5.75707 11.9972 5.82009 11.8961 5.90126 11.8105C5.98243 11.7249 6.08007 11.6566 6.1883 11.6097C6.29654 11.5628 6.41314 11.5382 6.5311 11.5376C6.64906 11.5369 6.76594 11.56 6.87471 11.6057C6.98349 11.6513 7.08191 11.7185 7.16407 11.8031L9.7672 14.2859L15.5859 8.7406C15.7561 8.5922 15.977 8.5153 16.2025 8.5259C16.4281 8.5366 16.6407 8.634 16.7961 8.7979C16.9515 8.9617 17.0375 9.1793 17.0362 9.405C17.0349 9.6308 16.9463 9.8474 16.7891 10.0094Z' fill='black'/%3E%3C/svg%3E%0A");
            background-size: contain;
            background-position: center;
            background-repeat: no-repeat;
        }


        .faq-area {
            margin-top: 24px;
        }
        .faq-item {
            padding: 18px 0;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #DFDFDF;
        }
        .faq-item.open {
            border-bottom: 1px solid #D39C10;
        }
        .faq-question {
            position: relative;
            font-size: 18px;
            font-weight: 700;
            line-height: 1.2;
            margin: 0;
            padding-right: 40px;
            cursor: pointer;
            user-select: none;
        }
        .faq-question:after {
            background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg width='16' height='16' viewBox='0 0 16 16' fill='none' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Crect x='7' width='2' height='16' fill='black'/%3E%3Crect x='16' y='7' width='2' height='16' transform='rotate(90 16 7)' fill='black'/%3E%3C/svg%3E%0A");
            background-size: contain;
            background-repeat: no-repeat;
            background-position: center;
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            right: 0;
            width: 16px;
            height: 16px;
            top: 50%;
            margin-top: -8px;
            transition: transform 0.3s ease;
        }
        .faq-item.open .faq-question:after {
            background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg width='16' height='2' viewBox='0 0 16 2' fill='none' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Crect x='16' width='2' height='16' transform='rotate(90 16 0)' fill='black'/%3E%3C/svg%3E%0A");
        }
        .faq-answer {
            display: none;
            color: #000000;
            margin: 16px 0 0;
            font-family: Axiforma;
            font-size: 16px;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 1.5;
            user-select: none;
            padding-right: 40px;
            max-height: 0;
            opacity: 0;
            overflow: hidden;
            transition: all 0.4s ease;
        }
        .faq-item.open .faq-answer {
          display: block;
        }
        .faq-item.open .faq-answer {
          max-height: 1200px;
          opacity: 1;
        }

        @media screen and (min-width: 1200px) {
            .home .features-item {
                align-items: center;
            }

            .features-item.sticky-row .features-img__wrapper {
                position: sticky;
                top: 100px;
                height: fit-content;
            }
            main {
                overflow-x: initial !important;
            }
            .features {
                overflow: initial !important;
            }
        }
    </style>

    
    <section class="posts cases-section">
        <div class="container">
            <h2 style="text-align: center;">Our <span style="display: inline-block;">Case Studies</span></h2>

                <div class="posts-lists">
                                    <div class="posts-item">
                        <a href="https://cool.co/publisher-experiences/maximizing-revenue-insticators-ssp-is-one-of-aditudes-top-5-demand-partners/" class="post-link"></a>
                        <div class="post-banner__wrapper">

                        </div>
                        <div class="post-content__wrapper">
                            <h2>Maximizing Revenue: COOL Media’s SSP is one of Aditude’s Top 5 Demand Partners</h2>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                                    <div class="posts-item">
                        <a href="https://cool.co/publisher-experiences/over-a-30-day-period-insticator-outperformed-disqus-across-all-kpis/" class="post-link"></a>
                        <div class="post-banner__wrapper">

                <style>
                    #form-section{
                        background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 1);
                        padding-top: 54px;

                    }
                    .form-title{
                        font-weight: 900;
                        font-size: 62px;
                        line-height: 69px;
                        color:#fff;
                        text-align: center;
                        margin-bottom: 42px ;
                    }
                    .form-wrapper{
                        max-width: 834px;
                        background: #00000099;

                        border-radius: 8px;
                        margin: 0 auto;
                        padding: 32px;
                        border: 2px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15);
                        box-sizing: border-box;
                        font-family: Axiforma;
                    }

                    .field{
                        max-width: 365px;
                        width: 50%;
                        display: inline-block;
                        vertical-align: middle;
                        margin-bottom: 24px;
                    }

                    .hs-fieldtype-textarea{
                        max-width: unset;
                        width: 100% !important;
                    }
                    .field:nth-child(odd) {
                        margin-right: 36px;
                    }
                    .form-columns-2:nth-child(4) .field {
                        max-width: unset;
                        width: 100% !important;
                    }

                    .hs-input{
                        width: 100%;
                        border-radius: 4px;
                        outline: none;
                        border: 1px solid rgba(55, 65, 81, 1);
                        background: #000000 !important;
                        color:#fff;
                        box-sizing: border-box;
                        padding: 12px !important;
                        font-family: 'Axiforma', sans-serif;

                    }
					
                    select.hs-input{
						padding: 16px !important
					}
                    .form-wrapper label{
                        color: #fff;
                        font-size: 14px;
                        line-height: 16px;
                        font-weight: 600;

                    }
                    .form-img{
                        width:100%;
                    }
                    .form-wrapper textarea{
                        resize: none !important;
                        margin-bottom: 4px;
                        color:#fff ;
                        height: 147px;
                    }

                    select.hs-input{
                        appearance: none;
                        background-image: url("https://cool.co/publisher-experiences/wp-content/themes/coolmedia-insticator/assets/img/custom-select.svg") !important;
                        background-repeat: no-repeat !important;
                        background-position: right 0.7rem top 50% !important;
                        background-size: 0.65rem auto !important;
                    }
                    .submitted-message{
                        color:#fff;
                    }
                    .hs-error-msgs{
                        position: absolute;
                        margin: 0;
                        padding: 0;
                        line-height: 16px;
                    }
                    .hs-error-msgs label{
                        font-size: 10px;
                    }

                    .hs-button{
                        padding: 12px 16px;
                        background: transparent;
                        font-size: 16px;
                        line-height: 24px;
                        font-weight: 600;
                        border-radius: 12px;
                        color: #D39C10;
                        position: relative;
                        z-index: 3;
                        cursor: pointer;
                        width: 100%;
                        height: 50px;
                        border: 2px solid #fff;
                        transition: background-color .2s, border .2s;
                        font-family: 'Axiforma', sans-serif;

                    }
                    .hs-button:hover {
                        background-color: #000;
                        border: 2px solid #D39C10 !important;
                    }
                    

                    .actions{
                        position: relative;
                    }
                    .actions:hover:before{
                        z-index: 4;
                    }
                    .actions:after {
                        content:"";
                        position: absolute;
                        width:100%;
                        height:50px;
                        background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 1);
                        z-index: 1;
                        left: 0;
                        top: 0;
                        border-radius: 12px;

                    }

                    .hs-recaptcha {
                        display: none;
                        opacity: 0;
                    }

                    @media screen and (max-width: 865px) {
                        .field{

                        }

                        .field:nth-child(odd) {
                            margin-right: unset;
                        }
                        .form-title{
                            font-size: 36px;
                        }
                        .form-wrapper{
                            margin: 0 10px;
                        }
                    }

<script>
  const header = document.getElementById('header');
  let lastScrollY = window.pageYOffset;
  window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
    const currentScrollY = window.pageYOffset;
    if (currentScrollY < lastScrollY) {
      header.classList.add('sticky');
    } else {
      header.classList.remove('sticky');
    }
    lastScrollY = currentScrollY;
  });
</script>
